questionHtml:
Which mechanism does benzene most readily undergo?

A.  Nucleophilic substitution

B.  Electrophilic substitution

C.  Electrophilic addition

D.  Free radical substitution

meta.title: Which mechanism does benzene most readily undergo? A. Nucleophilic substitution B. Electrophilic substitution C. Electrophilic addition D. Free radical substitution
